violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Sanitizing solution used to store wiping cloths was found at 50ppm. Wiping cloths should be stored in solutions at least 100ppm. **Chlorine solution used by facility.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine sanitizing solution was found at 0ppm during inspection. Chlorine solutions for sanitizing food contact surfaces should be at least 50ppm.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Observed zippered bags being washed to be reused. Single use items should not be reused.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Basement storage area floor has areas of exposed dirt. Storage areas should have surfaces that are easily cleanable.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving unit above the hand washing sink near ice machine and rolling metal carts were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation filters were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items were found on the floor in the basement. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Basement, used for storage, floor has areas of expose dirt. Flooring should be easily cleaned.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
